---
name: 📦 Template Submission
about: Share a template with the CodePage community
title: '[Template] '
labels: templates

---

## Template Description

What does this template generate? Be specific.

## Preview

Paste the exported JSON here (use the UI Export button to generate it):

```json
{
  "version": 1,
  "templates": [
    {
      "name": "Your Template Name",
      "prompt": "A clear prompt that generates the desired output"
    }
  ]
}
```

## Screenshot (optional)

Add a screenshot of the generated output to help users evaluate.

## Checklist

- [ ] Template name is unique (not conflicting with built-in templates)
- [ ] Prompt is clear and self-contained
- [ ] JSON format is valid

> 💡 Accepted templates will be added to the community collection in `docs/templates/`.
